name: avengers
description: 107 A-prefixed agent skills for Stark-style operating loops, prototyping, mistakes, resourcefulness, leadership, risk, and MCU story analysis.

interface.shortDescription: 107 A-prefixed skills for Stark-style operating modes.
interface.longDescription: Avengers is a searchable pack of A-prefixed skills for routing broad requests into concrete operating modes: Mark 1 prototypes, failure-to-upgrade retros, cave resourcefulness, permission-trap breaking, Civil War conflict maps, Ultron risk checks, MCU story analysis, and source-grounded synthesis.
defaultPrompt: Use $a-stark-router to choose the right Avengers skill.
Use $a-stark-operating-system for the full Stark loop.
Use $a-mark-one-prototype to define the first working version.
